title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-11 · US-Iran Conflict Escalates
summary: The US and Iran struck each other for a second straight day, and Trump threatened to intensify bombing if Iran does not immediately agree to a peace deal. Defense Secretary Hegseth said they would negotiate with bombs. Iran's ambassador said they would not negotiate under threats. Former defense intelligence officer Mann said the bombing is ineffective and mentioned possible US attacks on Iranian civilian infrastructure, which would constitute war crimes. Also, the Knicks staged a 29-point comeback to win Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-10 · Halalan sa Senado ng Maine: Platner vs. Collins
summary: Sa Democratic primary ng Maine, si Graham Platter, na nababalot ng iskandalo, ay nanalo laban kay Gobernador Janet Mills na may humigit-kumulang 75% ng boto, at haharapin ang Republican Senator Susan Collins. Kailangan ni Platter na makuha ang suporta ng mga tagasuporta ni Mills, samantalang si Collins ay may kalamangan pa rin sa mga independenteng botante. Iba pang balita: Naglunsad ang US ng missile strike sa Iran; Nag-apply ang OpenAI para sa IPO; Pagdinig sa Epstein files; Kontrobersyal na pahayag ni Victor Marx, kandidato para sa gobernador ng Colorado.

title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-09
summary: CNN This Morning报道：特朗普成为首位出席NBA总决赛的在任总统，尼克斯队13连胜被终结，球迷归咎于特朗普的‘霉运’；缅因州初选开始，民主党候选人Graham Platner能否挑战Susan Collins引发讨论；中西部洪水救援故事；私人飞机紧急迫降起火；乡村歌手Brad Paisley反对在纳什维尔动物园附近建数据中心；世界杯开幕在即，票价高昂引争议。

title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-08 · 以色列-伊朗冲突升级
summary: 以色列与伊朗相互发射导弹，伊朗声称袭击了以色列拉马特大卫空军基地，以色列则打击了伊朗石化厂和战略防御系统。此前，伊朗因以色列袭击贝鲁特而直接攻击以色列。胡塞武装也向以色列发射导弹。黎巴嫩总统指责伊朗将黎巴嫩作为谈判筹码。油价上涨。特朗普与内塔尼亚胡通话，但以色列仍发动报复性打击。菲律宾发生7.8级地震。

title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-05 · 美国参议院移民法案与FISA之争
summary: 美国参议院通过700亿美元共和党移民法案，资助ICE和边境巡逻队至特朗普任期结束，但FISA重新授权法案受阻。缅因州参议员候选人Graham Platner再陷争议，《纽约时报》报道其过往暴力行为，他否认但承认曾与PTSD斗争。Kevin O'Leary因公众抗议缩减犹他州AI数据中心项目。其他新闻包括NBA总决赛、航母火灾、世界杯临近等。

title: CNN This Morning · 2026-06-04 · 伊朗战争权力决议
summary: 四名共和党人跨党派投票支持限制特朗普对伊朗战争权力的决议，凸显党内对战争成本和经济压力的不满。财政部长贝森特在国会就战争对农业的影响与参议员交锋，被批缺乏同理心。纽约尼克斯队自尼克松时代以来首次有望夺冠。MMA乘客制服闹事者。
